title: Building Toronto Builder's Pack
description: A set of performance and cosmetic mods for members of the Minecraft Building Toronto Project.
body:
The Minecraft Building Toronto Project aims to fully recreate the City of Toronto on a 1:1 scale in minecraft. 

This Pack is designed to help reduce the lag that the project causes. These are client side mods only and are fully optional. 

Included Mods: 

**Performance Mods:**
 - ImmediatelyFast
 - Lithium
 - Sodium
 - Sodium Options
 - Starlight

**Cosmetic Mods:**
 - 3dSkinLayers
 - ChatHeads
 - Iris
 - BetterMountHud

Utilities:
 - ModMenu
 - Replay Mod
